title: Peri Papas Fries
description: A spicy twist on classic fries, inspired by peri peri chicken. Crispy fries tossed with a peri seasoning blend.

ingredients.name: Crispy
ingredients.notes: crispy fried onions or crispy fried shallots

instructions: Cut the potatoes into long, thin strips and soak in cold water for 30 minutes.
Drain the potatoes and pat dry with paper towels.
Toss the potatoes with a little oil and spread on a baking sheet.
Bake for 20-25 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
While the potatoes are baking, mix the peri seasoning blend with a little oil to create a paste.
Once the potatoes are done, toss them with the peri paste and crispy fried onions.
